stan_swiata.temat: Konflikt USA-Iran / Zamknięcie Cieśniny Ormuz / Groźba Kharg Island
stan_swiata.opis: Trump threatens to seize Kharg Island — qualitative escalation beyond ongoing strikes; Hormuz closure confirmed; major energy price risk for Poland, counter reset.
US inflation at 3-year high, Trump indifferent — indirect risk to Polish economy via global financial conditions, continuing to decay.
Conflict ongoing on Poland's eastern border with no qualitative change — deep background.
IAEA pressure on Iran's nuclear stockpile ongoing — slightly elevated given active US-Iran conflict, no new development, fading.
Xi Jinping in Pyongyang to revitalise ties — strategic shift with indirect NATO/Poland relevance, no new development, deep background.
Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon and Gaza ongoing — deep background, minimal direct impact on Poland.
